description: 12-archetype crystal lattice with SFCR lens meanings and correspondences

archetypes.name: Ignition

semantic.essence: The first spark that turns a possible pattern into a declared address.
semantic.motion: Starts, emits, names, commits the opening pulse.

lenses.S: Ignition as exact structural start: seed becomes addressable object.
lenses.F: Ignition as first turn of cycle: seed becomes motion and bloom.
lenses.C: Ignition as liminal test: is beginning lawful or only impulsive?
lenses.R: Ignition as replayable restart: crystal begins again without losing root.

correspondences.torah_vessel: Torah as living code and parser-header seed.

archetypes.density: A01 is the lawful spark: visible, phase-bearing, corridor-checked, replayable.

archetypes.name: Accumulation

semantic.essence: The rooting and storage function that keeps identity from evaporating.

lenses.S: Accumulation as durable structure: repository that holds what ignition produced.
lenses.F: Accumulation as phase-thickening: bloom becomes weight, gravity, persistence.
lenses.C: Accumulation as corridor pressure: is storage stabilizing or choking?
lenses.R: Accumulation as replayable reserve: stored signal re-entered without drift.

correspondences.torah_vessel: Noah's ark as world-vessel carrying complete seed through flood.

archetypes.density: A02 is storage with memory: capacity to keep identity intact for transformation.

archetypes.name: Bifurcation

semantic.essence: The lawful fork that creates multiple paths without losing track of origin.

lenses.F: Bifurcation as turning event: single orbit becomes two or more trajectories.
lenses.C: Bifurcation as corridor risk: split must stay lawful or becomes fragmentation.
lenses.R: Bifurcation as recursive branch law: every fork replays the same crystal grammar.

correspondences.torah_vessel: Ark of the Covenant as kernel vessel with transport logic.

archetypes.density: A03 is lawful branching: creates alternatives without losing the root backtrace.

archetypes.name: Enclosure

semantic.essence: The vessel boundary that binds and protects a pattern.

lenses.S: Enclosure as literal boundary geometry and container law.
lenses.F: Enclosure as phased interiority: bloom happens inside protected chamber.
lenses.C: Enclosure as boundary tension: where protection can become stagnation or breach.
lenses.R: Enclosure as reusable vessel grammar recurring at larger or smaller scales.

correspondences.torah_vessel: Tabernacle and temple as nested enclosure grammar.

archetypes.density: A04 is vessel law: chamber that protects and repeats upward as sanctuary architecture.

archetypes.name: Amplification

semantic.essence: The force multiplier that raises intensity and throughput.

lenses.S: Amplification as increased structural capacity and energetic width.
lenses.F: Amplification as widening orbit carrying more heat and consequence.
lenses.C: Amplification as corridor danger: more force may become instability.
lenses.R: Amplification as replayable scale-up: more force without changing root law.

archetypes.density: A05 is lawful intensification: crystal increases force without changing species.

archetypes.name: Discrimination

semantic.essence: The sorting intelligence that separates signal from noise.

lenses.F: Discrimination as phased refinement: bloom pruned into fitness.
lenses.C: Discrimination as liminal triage between lawful separation and harmful splitting.
lenses.R: Discrimination as recursive correction loop improving fidelity at each scale.

archetypes.density: A06 is the refining knife: separates workable paths from residue without cutting root.

archetypes.name: Calibration

semantic.essence: The tuning intelligence that aligns self with the law it serves.
semantic.shadow: Obsessive self-monitoring or endless adjustment without action.

lenses.S: Calibration as measurable alignment and explicit comparison.
lenses.F: Calibration as live adjustment inside the cycle's turn.
lenses.C: Calibration as corridor discernment: witness senses drift before failure hardens.
lenses.R: Calibration as recursive self-description that becomes future history.

archetypes.density: A07 is witness-tuning: crystal learns to compare itself against its own law.

archetypes.name: Dissolution

semantic.essence: The softening operator that releases rigid form and exposes inner layers.
semantic.shadow: Erosion, drift, loss of necessary form.

lenses.S: Dissolution as controlled release of structure rather than random collapse.
lenses.F: Dissolution as phase-unfolding: returns hardened form to process.
lenses.C: Dissolution as liminal thinning where release may become loss if not witnessed.
lenses.R: Dissolution as recursive peeling revealing deeper repeatable form.

archetypes.density: A08 is release with memory: crystal softens hardened form so motion returns without amnesia.

archetypes.name: Expansion

semantic.essence: The outward unfolding that extends care, range, and participation.

lenses.S: Expansion as enlarged structure and usable room for more pattern.
lenses.F: Expansion as bloom reaching beyond initial chamber.
lenses.C: Expansion as corridor risk between living outreach and uncontrolled diffusion.
lenses.R: Expansion as recursive propagation of care-pattern at larger scale.

archetypes.density: A09 is care in motion: crystal's outward unfolding into wider field of relation.

archetypes.name: Crystallization

semantic.essence: The sealing intelligence that turns growth into durable order.

lenses.S: Crystallization as exact commitment and optimized structural fit.
lenses.F: Crystallization as bloom reaching exact terminal shape.
lenses.C: Crystallization as liminal edge where commitment may seal truth or harden into blockage.
lenses.R: Crystallization as repeatable closure: crystal learns to seal without losing replay.

correspondences.torah_vessel: New Jerusalem as measured terminal city-lattice.

archetypes.density: A10 is exact commitment: form, allocation, and seal all line up at once.

archetypes.name: Disruption

semantic.essence: The rupture that breaks a stale frame so migration can begin.
semantic.gift: Liberation from dead structure and forced transition.

lenses.S: Disruption as explicit frame-break and structural release.
lenses.F: Disruption as turning point where one season breaks open into another.
lenses.C: Disruption as corridor shock: movement begins under pressure and uncertainty.
lenses.R: Disruption as recursive migration law: rupture becomes repeatable passage.

archetypes.density: A11 is threshold rupture: crystal breaks exhausted frame so migration becomes lawful.

archetypes.name: Completion

semantic.essence: The lawful close that publishes, hands off, and returns cycle to seed.
semantic.motion: Closes, seals, publishes, hands off, re-enters.

lenses.S: Completion as exact closure and publication.
lenses.F: Completion as last turn of bloom before handoff into next octave.
lenses.C: Completion as liminal edge between true closure and stagnation.
lenses.R: Completion as recursive return: end preserves enough memory to begin again.

correspondences.torah_vessel: Copper Scroll as geodetic mirror and handoff protocol.

archetypes.density: A12 is lawful closure with re-entry: crystal finishes only when it can publish and still return to seed.
